content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/src/lib/auth.ts:1	import { PrismaAdapter } from "@auth/prisma-adapter";2	import { NextAuthOptions } from "next-auth";3	import CredentialsProvider from "next-auth/providers/credentials";4	import { prisma } from "./prisma";5	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";6	7	export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {8	  adapter: PrismaAdapter(prisma) as any,9	  providers: [10	    CredentialsProvider({11	      name: "credentials",12	      credentials: {13	        email: { label: "Email", type: "email" },14	        password: { label: "Password", type: "password" },15	      },16	      async authorize(credentials) {17	        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) {18	          throw new Error("Invalid credentials");19	        }20	21	        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({22	          where: { email: credentials.email },23	        });24	25	        if (!user || !user.password) {26	          throw new Error("User not found");27	        }28	29	        const isPasswordCorrect = await bcrypt.compare(30	          credentials.password,31	          user.password32	        );33	34	        if (!isPasswordCorrect) {35	          throw new Error("Invalid password");36	        }37	38	        return {39	          id: user.id,40	          email: user.email,41	          name: user.name,42	          role: user.role,43	        };44	      },45	    }),46	  ],47	  callbacks: {48	    async jwt({ token, user }) {49	      if (user) {50	        token.role = (user as any).role;51	        token.id = user.id;52	      }53	      return token;54	    },55	    async session({ session, token }) {56	      if (session.user) {57	        (session.user as any).role = token.role;58	        (session.user as any).id = token.id;59	      }60	      return session;61	    },62	  },63	  pages: {64	    signIn: "/login",65	  },66	  session: {67	    strategy: "jwt",68	  },69	  secret: process.env.NEXTAUTH_SECRET,70	};
